# Airline Delay Analysis

## Problem
Analyze flight delays to identify patterns by airline, airport, and time of day.

## Dataset
US Flight Delays (Bureau of Transportation Statistics)

## Tools
## Tools
![Python](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3.10-blue)
![pandas](https://img.shields.io/badge/pandas-1.5.3-lightgrey)
![SQL](https://img.shields.io/badge/SQL-PostgreSQL-003366)
![Streamlit](https://img.shields.io/badge/Streamlit-1.26-orange)

## Analysis & Insights
- Airline X has the highest average delay
- Airport Y is the most congested
- Morning departures are generally more reliable

## Dashboard
[Live Streamlit Dashboard](https://share.streamlit.io/yourusername/airline-delay-app/main)

## GitHub
[View Code](https://github.com/yourusername/airline-delay-analysis)
